property.name: com.xceptance.xlt.loadtests.comment.commandLine
property.value:
All, new 2 cpu non-shared machine

Let's ramp up more

property.name: com.xceptance.xlt.loadtests.comment
property.value: Test run using the posters simple loadtest suite.

property.name: com.xceptance.xlt.customSamplers.1.description
property.value: This is a value sampler demo.

comments.string: Test run using the posters simple loadtest suite.

All, new 2 cpu non-shared machine

Let's ramp up more

error.message: The addToCart call returned the wrong count expected:<1> but was:<2>
